title: Nesdin
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Citation}} {{Character |type= |image= |name=Nesdin |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Human/Legends|Human]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin= |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation= |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|Mr. Nesdin, while Mr. Talkpha is so engaged please contact our next scheduled stop and advise that we will be delayed by a priority courier mission. Then get us moving to Corellia.''"
"''Yes, ma'am.|Mara Jade and Nesdin|''[[Ambush at Corellia]]''}} '''Nesdin''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]]. He was the pilot of the ship ''[[Jade's Fire]]''. After the resolution of the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], [[Mara Jade Skywalker|Mara Jade]] surmised that he was most likely dead, but hoped there was a chance he had only been captured or had hidden on [[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *''[[Ambush at Corellia]]'' {{1st}} *''[[Showdown at Centerpoint]]'' {{Mo}} ==Sources== *''[[Cracken's Threat Dossier]]'' *''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Nesdin }} [[Category:Humans]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Pilots]]
